_notes: Kenney Car Kit non-vehicle props (CC0). box/cone/cone-flat are touchable street furniture (box collision); the debris-* set is small drive-over litter (bolts/plates/tires/spoilers/doors), collision none. Scale 1.2 is the same kit-wide scale as the Kenney vehicles (sedan 1.5 m -> 1.8 m wide), so props read at true size against the cars. Prefab-only, NO palette (these are scattered/placed props, not tiles). Materials embed an external colormap texture copied alongside the GLBs. NO catch-all: an unrecognized garage GLB fails the coverage gate. CC0, credited in README.
